deal.product_description: Samsung's 49" Odyssey OLED G9 (dual QHD 5120x1440) curved gaming monitor delivers an immersive ultrawide experience with a 240Hz refresh rate and 1ms response time. It supports AMD FreeSync Premium Pro, features multiple USB ports, and is designed for high-end gaming and multitasking across expansive desktop space. The large curved OLED panel emphasizes deep contrast and fast motion handling.
